name: stock-watcher
tagline: ClawHub (86★): Manage and monitor a personal stock watchlist with support for adding, removing, listing stocks, and summarizing their recen
verdict: Adding a stock only validates the code format, with no existence or duplicate check described - running 'add' twice for the same ticker duplicates the watchlist entry. It also has no scope-exclusion language despite covering several distinct operations, and no version tracking to know if it's been revised.

highlights.summary: Adding a stock only validates the code format before appending; no existence/duplicate check is described, so running "add" twice for the same code would duplicate the entry in wat
No "NOT for" / out-of-scope / pointer-to-other-skill language appears anywhere in the description or body, despite the skill covering several distinct operations (add/remove/list/c
No version field in frontmatter, no changelog section, and no dated revision notes appear anywhere in the file.
